styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents

cases.prompt_body: Front-right launch-pad service portrait of the Space Shuttle Challenger stack during prelaunch readiness, camera tightened around the orbiter belly, external tank, and right solid rocket booster aft field-joint zone, shuttle geometry and tower hardware remain canonical and calm, one dark heat-scuffed soot crescent rides the right booster aft field-joint band as a routine-looking but wrong seam condition, no smoke release from the joint, no ignition, pale gray dawn sky, muted concrete, restrained industrial calm

Subsystem close view of the Challenger right solid rocket booster aft field joint on the launch pad, cylindrical booster skin, field-joint band, attachment hardware, and nearby service structure remain canonical, one narrow charcoal blow-by trace and slightly heat-stained seal path interrupt the otherwise routine seam, enough launch-pad context to read preflight readiness, no labels, no flame, no liftoff, parchment beige, muted blue-gray, restrained morning light

Machine-in-pad portrait of Challenger from the lower orbiter through the launch platform, right solid rocket booster aft field-joint ring clearly visible below the wing and beside the service structure, the stack remains calm and fully recognizable, the right joint carries one repeated dark soot arc and a localized heat-worn seam while the rest of the hardware reads as ordinary launch routine, no active leak, no spectacle, muted blue, bone white, charcoal, restrained cold light
